reasoning: Tesla continues to accept orders for the Cybertruck as of late February 2026, with the delivery backlog for the dual-motor AWD model recently extending to September-October 2026. The active introduction of new pricing strategies and an ongoing backlog well past the resolution date of April 1, 2026, make it virtually impossible that Tesla will discontinue all retail sales of the Cybertruck before the deadline, which is just one month away.
